sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ صُعُوبَةً فِي التَّوَاصُلِ لِأَنَّ أَهْلَ الْمَنْطِقَةِ لَا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Imao sam poteškoća u komunikaciji jer mještani ne govore arapski.
sentences.translationEn: I had difficulty communicating because the locals did not speak Arabic.

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلْتُ أَنْ أَتَكَلَّمَ بِالْإِشَارَاتِ وَبَعْضِ الْكَلِمَاتِ الإِنْجِلِيزِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pokušavao sam komunicirati gestama i par engleskih riječi.
sentences.translationEn: I tried to communicate with gestures and a few English words.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْتُ تَطْبِيقَ التَّرْجَمَةِ عَلَى هَاتِفِي وَسَاعَدَنِي كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Koristio sam aplikaciju za prevođenje na telefonu i mnogo mi je pomogla.
sentences.translationEn: I used a translation app on my phone and it helped me a lot.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكْنَا أَنَا وَالسُّكَّانُ مِنَ الأَخْطَاءِ اللُّغَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mještani i ja smo se smijali jezičnim greškama.
sentences.translationEn: The locals and I laughed at the language mistakes.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمْتُ أَنَّ الِابْتِسَامَةَ لُغَةٌ يَفْهَمُهَا الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: Naučio sam da je osmijeh jezik koji svi razumiju.
sentences.translationEn: I learned that a smile is a language everyone understands.
